steps.title: Use the fellowship context
steps.content: The fellowship is for exceptional folk and traditional artists, and Leilani Makana received it for lifetime contributions to the arts. The blank must describe recognition or celebration of those artists.

steps.title: Reject opposite meanings
steps.content: Choice A means to start, but the fellowship recognizes artists rather than creating them. Choice B means to divert attention away. Choice C means to eclipse or diminish, the opposite of a prestigious award. The answer is D.
